scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.dev:all: npm run db:setup && concurrently -n db,be,fe -c blue,green,magenta "echo DB ready" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:generate --prefix backend && npm run db:migrate --prefix backend
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
